sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka nuntak na nong kem den hi
Phalbi, khua khal , tuk hun sung
Na khut tawh nong huai hi
Thuman na ah kei nong kha hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nong itna la in kasa ding hi
Kei tungah nong muan huai hi
Na ang sungah kei nong pom den hi
Nong khah ngei keing ding hi
